next_steps: Perform bone marrow aspiration and biopsy with flow cytometry and cytogenetic analysis
Order flow cytometry for PNH markers (CD55/CD59) on peripheral blood
Obtain reticulocyte count, haptoglobin, and peripheral smear evaluation for schistocytes or abnormal morphology
Measure B12, folate, homocysteine, methylmalonic acid, and serum copper/ceruloplasmin levels
Evaluate for HLH using ferritin, triglycerides, fibrinogen, and soluble IL-2 receptor (sCD25) levels
Continue close hemodynamic monitoring in an inpatient setting until a specific diagnosis is confirmed
